mapper.sql: id, invoice_no, customer_id, customer_name, total_amount, settled_amount, tax_number, status, invoice_date, factory_id, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT /*+ USE_INDEX(t_erp_fin_invoice PRIMARY) */ FROM t_erp_fin_invoice WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS invoicedAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('PENDING','PARTIAL') THEN total_amount - settled_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pendingAmount, CASE WHEN SUM(total_amount) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(SUM(settled_amount) / SUM(total_amount) * 100, 1) END AS reconcileRate FROM t_erp_fin_invoice WHERE factory_id = #{factoryId} AND status != 'RED_ISSUED'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_erp_fin_invoice (invoice_no, customer_id, customer_name, total_amount, settled_amount, tax_number, status, invoice_date, factory_id, remark, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{invoiceNo}, #{customerId}, #{customerName}, #{totalAmount}, #{settledAmount}, #{taxNumber, typeHandler=com.ruoyi.common.core.type.EncryptTypeHandler}, #{status}, #{invoiceDate}, #{factoryId}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime})
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_erp_fin_invoice
customer_name = #{customerName}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, settled_amount = #{settledAmount}, status = #{status},
tax_number = #{taxNumber, typeHandler=com.ruoyi.common.core.type.EncryptTypeHandler},
remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime},
WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_erp_fin_invoice SET settled_amount = #{settledAmount}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
